attributes.action: No to the “implementation” of Digital ID.
attributes.additional_details:
The British public clearly expressed its opposition to a digital ID through a petition.  

A remarkable 2,984,191 signatures demonstrated the consistent consensus of the public.  

Despite this, on 13 May 2026 the government disregarded the people’s wishes and proceeded with the implementation of a digital ID.
attributes.background:
The British public clearly expressed its opposition to a digital ID. 

A remarkable 2,984,191 signatures demonstrated the consistent consensus of the public.  

Despite this, on 13 May 2026 the government disregarded the people’s wishes and proceeded with the implementation of a digital ID.

rejection.details:
We have this petition (below) already open on the subject which you may wish to sign:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757131
